Petn. For Reconsideration Of Part Of Oct. 16, 2006 Order Filed Oct. 17, 2006 In Form Of Declaration By Chestene Mason As Executor
Off Calendar Dec-11-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Arnold Weber appearing for and with Chestene Mason. Court accepts the assignment from the three beneficiaries. Matter granted. Order signed as modified. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Karla Davis, CSR#12998. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petn. For Reconsideration Of Part Of Oct. 16, 2006 Order Filed Oct. 17, 2006 In Form Of Declaration By Chestene Mason As Executor

Petition For Approval Of Costs And Reimbursement And Allowance Of Attorney Fees; Declartion
Off Calendar Oct-16-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Arnold Weber appearing for executor. Mr. Gross is not in Court. He has filed objections. Court's tentative ruling is the extraordinary fees for the Guardianship proceeding is denied. The extraordinary fees for responding to objections is approved. Mr. Weber accepts the ruling and he will take up the fees for the guardianship with the executor. Court will review the order before signing it. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Patty Hubble CSR#3058. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of A Copy Of Letters Of Guardianship
Off Calendar Aug-30-2006 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Establishment Of Guardianship
Off Calendar Jun-13-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Arnold Weber appearing for Chestene Mason. Leonard Gross appearing for and with Karen Osby and for Robert Mason, Jr.. Parties have stipulated to Karen Osby as guardian of estate. Funds will be placed into a blocked account. Mr. Gross' fees will be paid from the minor's share. Mr. Weber will prepare an order and send it to Mr. Gross for approval as to form. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

By Attorney For Robert Rodney Mason, Jr. For Compensation For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar May-22-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Leonard Gross appearing for and with Karen Osby, guardian ad litem for Robert Mason, Jr. and for Robert Mason, Jr. Arnold Weber appearing for Chestene Mason, executor. Court is having problem with fees on both sides. They are too high. Both counsel present their arguments. Benjamin James appearing as other counsel. Matter submitted. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
